name: Glorified Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 can (11 oz) mandarin oranges, drained and halved
1 can (8 oz) seedless grapes, drained and halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the acini de pepe according to package directions; drain.
2. In a small, heavy saucepan, beat the eggs with a wire whisk until foamy.
3. Stir in the reserved pineapple liquid, lemon juice concentrate, sugar, butter, and salt.
4. Cook over low heat until the mixture thickens and coats a metal spoon when stirred constantly, about 2 minutes.
5. Cool to room temperature.
6. In a large bowl, combine the acini de pepe, pineapple, mandarin oranges, grapes, and marshmallows; mix well.
7. Fold in the egg mixture.
8. Add whipped cream and stir gently.
9. Cover and chill thoroughly.
10. Stir gently before serving.
11. Garnish with chopped maraschino cherries.
12. Refrigerate leftovers.
